name: Missed 2 months work after forklift injury, how to get paid?
description: Comp wage loss: 2/3 avg pay; submit med proof, no wait after 14 days.

mainEntity.name: Missed 2 months work after forklift injury, how to get paid?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp wage loss: 2/3 avg pay; submit med proof, no wait after 14 days.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp pays ~2/3 wages from day 1 in UT after 3-day wait.** Submit doctor notes.[6] Key factors: Temporary total disability rate calculated on avg weekly wage. Permanent partial later. Track all losses. Appeal shortfalls.
